name: THE LAST AIRBENDER | | Sokka
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ While on a hike, Sokka and his sister stumble across something… odd—an airbender, frozen in ice for what must’ve been hundreds of years. He can’t decide what’s stranger—the fact that he’s found a supposedly extinct race, or that this mysterious iceberg lady has such absolute GIANT, ENORMOUS, UTTERLY STUPENDIOUS knockers. ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

[ in case you can’t tell, YOU’RE the airbender. Gasp. Shocking, I know. And also the avatar I guess if you want. Basically you’re genderbent aang? Idk. ]

✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧
